The '''''Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook''''' is a supplement for the Second Edition of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Bring all the excitement of the Star Wars universe to your games with the Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook. This book is a collection of inspirational and entertaining essays on all aspects of game design, from encounters, to creating gamemaster characters, to how to ''really'' start a fun campaign. A complete guidebook on how to bring the Star Wars universe to life.''

==Contents==
*Introduction by [[Bill Smith]]
*Beginning Adventures by [[Chuck Truett]]
*The Star Wars Adventure by Chuck Truett
*Settings by Chuck Truett
*Gamemaster Characters by [[Steven H. Lorenz]]
*Encounters by Chuck Truett
*Equipment and Artifacts by [[Eric S. Trautmann]]
*Props by Steven H. Lorenz
*Improvisation by Steven H. Lorenz
*Campaigns by [[John Terra]]
*[[Tales of the Smoking Blaster]] by Bill Smith
*Star Wars Rules Questions
*The Star Wars Questionnaire
